label: Russian Military Casualties
contestNote: Russia has never released official casualty figures. Western estimates range from 900K–1.3M KIA+WIA+MIA. Russia's MoD claims minimal losses.
deltaNote: Western estimate for late 2025 monthly losses

label: Ukrainian Military Casualties
contestNote: Zelenskyy stated 55,000 killed (2026); UALosses project documented 86,142 by name + 89,000+ MIA. CSIS estimates 100K–140K killed.

label: Verified Civilian Deaths (UN)
contestNote: UN emphasizes real figures are considerably higher due to underreporting. 2025 was deadliest year for civilians since 2022.

label: Ukrainian Territory Under Russian Control
contestNote: Russia annexed Donetsk, Luhansk, Zaporizhzhia, and Kherson oblasts in Sep 2022, but doesn't fully control all four. Frontline still active.
deltaNote: Slow Russian gains despite massive losses

label: Frozen Russian State Assets
contestNote: Primarily held in Euroclear, Belgium (~€210B). Legal barriers prevent full seizure; G7 using interest (~$3B/year) to back $50B Ukraine loan.

label: Total Western Aid to Ukraine
contestNote: Includes US, EU, Germany, UK, Canada and other allies. US largest single donor; EU collectively surpassed US in 2024.
